description: You are a security analyst performing a compliance audit of this Tor Browser installation. Your organization's security policy is at /home/ga/Documents/AuditPackage/security_policy.md. Audit the browser against all 4 requirements in the policy, remediate any non-compliant items, and verify fixes are effective. Create your compliance report at /home/ga/Documents/AuditPackage/compliance_report.txt. For each requirement (REQ-1 through REQ-4) include: Initial State (exact values observed before changes), Status (COMPLIANT or REMEDIATED or FAILED), Evidence (specific values or observations after changes), and Action Taken (what you changed, or 'None - already compliant'). End the report with a Summary section listing total COMPLIANT, REMEDIATED, and FAILED counts.
